steps.name: review-project-state
steps.description: Aggregate and present project state to researcher.

steps.name: discuss-decisions
steps.description: Three-round discussion with researcher: new tasks, suggestion cleanup, confirmation.

steps.name: apply-decisions
steps.description: Create two new task folders, eight correction files for suggestion cleanup.

steps.name: finalize
steps.description: Write results, run verificators, materialize, push, PR, merge.
